info.name: Asana Get events on a resource

params.name: resource
params.description: A resource ID to subscribe to.

params.name: sync
params.description: A sync token received from the last request, or none on first request.

items.docs: Returns the full record for all events that have occurred since the sync token was created. A GET request to the endpoint with no sync token will return a 412 error providing a new sync token.
